summary: Saints edit The Seven Apostolic Men , Martyr Bishops, ordained in Rome by Saints Peter and Paul and sent to evangelize Spain 1st century : Saints Torquatus , Ctesiphon , Secundus , Indaletius , Caecilius , Hesychius , and Euphrasius 1 2 3 Saint Achillius Achillios , Bishop of Larissa 330 4 5 Saint Pachomius the Great, founder of cenobitic monasticism 348 6 7 Saint Silvanus of Tabennisi , disciple of Saint Pachomius the Great in the Thebaid 4th century 8 Saint Pyrrhus of Breti , one of Thirteen Assyrian Fathers 6th century 9 Saint Barbarus the Myrrh-gusher of Greece c
